name: Calumon Dust

cost.special: Cannot be purchased — GM awarded only

effect: Spend as a Free Action on your turn. Your Digimon immediately digivolves one stage above their Default Stage at no Hope cost. This digivolution does not require a Basic Action. The Hope maintenance cost still applies from next turn.
notes: Instant digivolution 1 stage above Default, no Hope initiation cost. Maintenance cost still applies from next turn.
